# Alexander Lazarovich — Full Stack Engineer

> Interactive 3D portfolio at https://www.alexlaz.dev — explore my career in an immersive Three.js world.

## Who I Am

Alexander Lazarovich (Alex Laz) is a Full Stack Engineer with 5+ years of experience building production web applications. Based in Israel. Passionate about clean architecture, interactive UIs, and developer tooling.

## Skills & Stack

- **Frontend**: React, TypeScript, Redux, Next.js, Three.js, WebGL
- **Backend**: Node.js, NestJS, REST APIs, GraphQL, Microservices
- **Databases**: PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis
- **Cloud & DevOps**: AWS, Docker, CI/CD pipelines
- **Other**: WebSockets, Jest, Cypress, Storybook

## Career Timeline

### The5ers (2024 – present)
Full Stack Engineer at a proprietary trading firm. Built trading dashboards, risk management tools, and real-time data pipelines.

### Triolla (2023 – 2024)
Full Stack Engineer. Developed SaaS platform features and led frontend architecture decisions using React and NestJS.

### Restigo (2022 – 2023)
Full Stack Engineer at a restaurant management SaaS startup. Implemented core product features end-to-end.

### ASML (2018 – 2022)
Software Engineer at the world's leading semiconductor lithography company. Built internal tooling and automation systems in a high-precision engineering environment.

## About This Site

This portfolio is itself a demonstration of technical skill — an open-world 3D experience built entirely from scratch:
- Engine: Three.js (WebGL), TypeScript, Vite
- Features: GLTF character models with animation state machines, procedural dog AI, timeline gate portals, click-to-discover objects, cinematic overlays, mobile touch controls
- No frameworks or game engines — pure Three.js + custom physics

## Contact & CV

- Portfolio: https://www.alexlaz.dev/
- CV download: https://www.alexlaz.dev/AL_CV_TH5_v2.pdf
